name: Zustand Store Ordering Rule
description: When handling aggregate cluster clicks in GlobalEventMap, always call setSelectedEvent(null) BEFORE setSelectedCountry(code) because the former resets the latter.

name: GDELT Country Codes
description: GDELT ActionGeo_CountryCode uses FIPS codes, not ISO-2. Use LOOKUP-COUNTRIES.txt for ActionGeo labels instead of CAMEO.country.txt.

content: Always deduplicate GKG themes before rendering using new Set(), and strip machine-readable prefixes via cleanGkgTheme().
gdelt-lookups.ts contains QUAD_CLASS_LABELS, CAMEO_ROOT_LABELS, ACTOR_TYPE_LABELS — always use these, never hardcode strings

name: threat-level-labels
description: Score thresholds: LOW 0-30 green, MODERATE 31-50 amber, ELEVATED 51-70 orange, CRITICAL 71-100 red — used in Threat Monitor cards and Dossier panel

content: Spike alerts panel sits above Threat Monitor in sidebar, polls every 5 min, collapsible
